pageDescription: Calculate your take-home pay after taxes and deductions with comprehensive salary analysis including overtime, bonuses, and benefits valuation

grossVsNet.title: Gross vs Net Pay
grossVsNet.description: Gross pay is before deductions; net pay is what you actually receive

deductions.title: Common Deductions
deductions.description: Federal tax, state tax, Social Security, Medicare, insurance premiums

benefits.title: Benefits Valuation
benefits.description: Employer benefits like health insurance can be worth 30-40% of salary

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides salary calculation estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual take-home pay may vary based on specific tax situations and deductions

importantNotesList: Tax rates vary by state and locality
Consider total compensation package, not just salary
Regular pay periods help with budgeting and financial planning

messages.enterInformation: Enter your salary information to calculate take-home pay
messages.resultMessage: Your salary calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides salary calculation estimates based on general tax information. Actual take-home pay may vary based on specific tax situations, local taxes, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized salary analysis and tax planning, consult tax professionals or financial advisors with expertise in compensation and individual tax circumstances.

errors.grossSalary: Please enter a valid gross salary
errors.dependents: Please enter a valid number of dependents
errors.overtimeRate: Please enter a valid overtime rate

tooltips.grossSalary: Your total annual salary before any deductions
tooltips.payFrequency: How often you receive your paycheck
tooltips.filingStatus: Your tax filing status affects tax rates and deductions
tooltips.dependents: Number of dependents claimed on your tax return
tooltips.additionalIncome: Income from sources other than your primary job
tooltips.overtimeRate: Rate of pay for overtime hours (typically 1.5x regular rate)
tooltips.preTaxDeductions: Deductions taken before taxes (401k, HSA, etc.)
tooltips.postTaxDeductions: Deductions taken after taxes (Roth IRA, union dues, etc.)

k_5_working_days_per_week_260_total_days: • 5 working days per week = 260 total days
enter_your_salary_information_to_see_con: Enter your salary information to see conversions
adjusted_annual_unadjusted_annual_workin: Adjusted Annual = Unadjusted Annual × (Working Days After Time Off ÷ 260)
